note: History-preserving Stage-1 v3 upload manifest TEMPLATE. Fields with null are returned by the actual owner-reviewed upload run and MUST be filled from that run, never fabricated. No credentials are used from this repo.

immutable_source.role: upstream source object; already published; UNCHANGED by the v3 release
immutable_source.license: MIT (upstream CZI dataset; confirmed from Croissant metadata across all 12 splits)

historical.role: prior Stage-1 v2 manifest / display seed; retained as historical, not deleted

stage1_v3_release.role: history-preserving v3 bundle added as a NEW revision; supersedes the v2 display/manifest layer only

verification.note: Frozen v3 scientific identities are re-derived by the in-repo verifiers, not copied here. Run these and expect exit 0 before/after any upload.
